text: Science has a clearer story about sample return missions than social media does. Sample return missions capture materials from other planets or moons, bringing them back for Earth-based analysis. Why is this important? Because they reveal secrets about our solar system's history. Take the OSIRIS-REx mission, which collected asteroid samples. Scientists are eagerly awaiting the results! These missions help us understand the building blocks of life and the potential for future colonization. Curious about future missions? Hit like and follow for more space science!
